name: @myndhyve/wop-conformance
description: Black-box conformance test suite for WOP-compliant servers. FINAL v1.0 (suite at 1.15.0). 1.15.0 tightens errors.test.ts to assert additionalProperties:false equivalent (no top-level keys outside {error, message, details}) + adds details.correlationId placement convention assertions. Catches hosts that emit correlationId/hint/requestId at the top level — those violate schemas/error-envelope.schema.json. 1.14.0 closed LT3 fully (staleClaim multi-process). 1.13.0 added LT3 timing-sensitive scenarios + wop-replay-fork profile. 1.12.0 added LT5 debug-bundle.
